## The aim to detect if the test subject has Parkinson's Disease from the given symptoms.
### Here the usage of GAN is made use of - for discriminating the true condition of Parkinson's to that of the synthetic data generated by a artificial dataset.

The Datasets used are from the public domain and are available in kaggle.

the synthetic dataset is :
* https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/miadul/parkinsons-disease-synthetic-dataset?resource=download
the medical study of the actual disease is taken as :
* https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/miadul/parkinsons-disease-synthetic-dataset?resource=download
